query: SELECT id, name, role, email, phone, notes FROM contacts WHERE organizationId = 990001 ORDER BY role;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT id, name, role, email, phone, notes FROM contacts WHERE organizationId = 990001 ORDER BY role;

rows.name: Pete Furlow
rows.notes: Main contact for New Lantern portal, document uploads, and HL7 / interface coordination. Pete is RMCA's project/interface lead, not a reading radiologist (reading rads are TRC; Dr. Shulman attends weeklies).

rows.name: Tracie Schmiedl
rows.notes: Primary contact for user lists, procedure codes, credentialing, training coordination, and chargemaster spreadsheets. Owes (per 4/23): AE titles for DICOM testing, example ORU messages for CT lung/Dynacad breast MRI/mammogram, and full patient registration test packs with images.

rows.name: Melissa Desimone
rows.notes: Licensing — nuclear medicine provider licensing questions coordinated with Leigh Ann Hobson and Rhonda Bennett.

rows.name: John Jordan
rows.notes: IT / networking; works with Waylon Hyde on VPN setup

rows.name: John Jordan
rows.notes: RMC IT — VPN tunnel / network setup with Scipiotech (Waylon Hyde) and firewall/port coordination.

rows.name: Greg Poe
rows.notes: RMC IT. Coordinates with Randy Wilson and Paragon on ORU profile/field validation for report filing.

rows.name: Randy Wilson
rows.notes: RMC IT integration lead. Owns Paragon-side HL7 work — investigating ORM/ORU filing errors (invalid patient account/visit numbers, accession/session mapping), coordinating with Greg Poe and Paragon resources, resending modified ORM test cases.

rows.name: Scott Cooper
rows.notes: RMC IT — project/technical participant on RMCA weeklies.

rows.name: Tripp Johnson
rows.notes: RMC IT — project/technical participant on RMCA weeklies.

rows.name: Waylon Hyde
rows.notes: RMC IT / CPIO — VPN connectivity and network access for Silverback/New Lantern.
